title: Community Projects
subtitle: Track staged municipality and cooperative announcements.

about.title: About this page
about.body: Project announcements are non-urgent updates posted to the community feed and member notification centre. Use them for programme news, volunteer recruitment, event notices, and impact updates. Unlike emergency alerts, announcements are queued and delivered on the platform's normal notification schedule.
about.draft: Not visible to members; edit freely before publishing.
about.active: Published and visible in the community feed. Use add update to post milestone updates to subscribers.
about.paused_completed: Archived from the active feed. Subscribers are notified on completion.

list.title: Project announcements
list.subtitle: Publish initiatives and milestone updates that members can subscribe to.
